description: As an Environmental Compliance Specialist at Pacific Northwest Environmental Services, format the unformatted 'environmental_compliance_report_raw.docx' for regulatory submission to the Washington State Department of Ecology. The document contains a cover page, executive summary, five technical sections with data tables and figure placeholders, and appendices. Apply 'Heading 1' style to the seven major section titles (Executive Summary, Sections 1 through 5, and Appendices) and 'Heading 2' to all subsection titles. Create three document sections using section breaks: a Title Page with no page number, Front Matter (Executive Summary and Table of Contents pages) with lowercase Roman numeral page numbers centered in the footer, and Body (Sections 1-5 and Appendices) with Arabic page numbers starting at 1 in the footer. Insert an auto-generated Table of Contents on a new page after the Executive Summary. Add Word auto-numbered captions to all three data tables and all three figure placeholders. Replace each '[see Table X]' and '[see Figure X]' text placeholder in the body with a live Word cross-reference to the matching caption. Insert a Table of Figures after the TOC. Save as 'environmental_compliance_final.docx' in Desktop\WordTasks.
